findings.description: Commit 'backend: Fix all-namespace cache invalidation' is missing SubArea. Suggest: 'backend: k8cache: Fix all-namespace cache invalidation'.
Guard 'if keyPart[2] == "" { return }' correctly prevents DeleteKeys from treating a cluster-scoped key as if it also has an all-namespace variant to delete.
handleKeyGenerationAndDeletion now delegates to DeleteKeys, unifying invalidation logic and fixing the all-namespace eviction gap.
New TestDeleteKeys case 'cluster scoped key does not delete namespaced key' directly validates the guard added in this PR.
TestRunInformerToWatchDeletesAllNamespaceKey uses assert.Eventually with 50ms poll, exercises full informer-event path, and asserts eviction of both namespace-specific and all-namespace keys.
